title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by going to Settings and selecting Security.

title: Change Email
content: Users can update their email address from the account settings page.

title: Delete Account
content: To delete an account, navigate to Settings and choose Delete Account.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two factor authentication by going to Settings > Security and turning on Two Factor Authentication.

title: Contact Support
content: Users can contact support by submitting a request through the help center.
